title: Glow Pulse Button
summary: A CTA that breathes with a soft pulsing glow to draw the eye.
description: Animates an expanding box-shadow halo (and subtle scale) in a gentle loop to create an attention-seeking 'breathing' glow around the button.
performance_notes: Animating box-shadow repaints; acceptable for a single hero CTA, avoid many on screen at once.
accessibility_notes: Attention pulse can be distracting; it stops under prefers-reduced-motion. Don't use more than one pulsing element per view.
ai_usage: Use sparingly for the single most important CTA. Apply .pulse-btn; the keyframes animate box-shadow from a tight ring to a wide soft halo and back. Match --glow to your brand accent. Strongly prefer disabling after first interaction or after a few seconds to avoid annoyance; the reduced-motion guard is mandatory.
source:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Glow Pulse Button</title>
  <script type="application/json" id="effect-meta">
  {
    "id": "glow-pulse-button",
    "title": "Glow Pulse Button",
    "summary": "A CTA that breathes with a soft pulsing glow to draw the eye.",
    "description": "Animates an expanding box-shadow halo (and subtle scale) in a gentle loop to create an attention-seeking 'breathing' glow around the button.",
    "theme": "buttons",
    "categories": ["button", "glow", "attention"],
    "tags": ["glow", "pulse", "breathing", "cta", "box-shadow", "attention"],
    "tech": ["css"],
    "era": "2020s",
    "difficulty": "beginner",
    "dependencies": [],
    "browser_support": "All modern browsers.",
    "performance_notes": "Animating box-shadow repaints; acceptable for a single hero CTA, avoid many on screen at once.",
    "accessibility_notes": "Attention pulse can be distracting; it stops under prefers-reduced-motion. Don't use more than one pulsing element per view.",
    "customization": [
      { "name": "--glow", "description": "Halo color", "default": "#7c5cff" },
      { "name": "--rate", "description": "Pulse duration", "default": "2.2s" }
    ],
    "variations": ["Stronger halo for dark heroes", "Pulse only until first interaction (JS)", "Green 'success' or red 'urgent' palettes"],
    "related": ["neon-glow-text", "gradient-border-button"],
    "ai_usage": "Use sparingly for the single most important CTA. Apply .pulse-btn; the keyframes animate box-shadow from a tight ring to a wide soft halo and back. Match --glow to your brand accent. Strongly prefer disabling after first interaction or after a few seconds to avoid annoyance; the reduced-motion guard is mandatory."
  }
  </script>
  <style>
    :root { --glow: #7c5cff; --rate: 2.2s; }
    html, body { height: 100%; margin: 0; }
    body { display: grid; place-items: center; background: #0b0d12; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; }
    .pulse-btn {
      border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem;
      padding: 0.95rem 2.4rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--glow);
      animation: pulse var(--rate) ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--glow) 70%, transparent); transform: scale(1); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 36px 8px color-mix(in srgb, var(--glow) 55%, transparent); transform: scale(1.04); }
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .pulse-btn { animation: none; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <button class="pulse-btn">Start free trial</button>
</body>
</html>
